title: Photocatalysis

graph TD

    K2 --> L2

    S2 --> U2[Quantum Efficiency]

    V2 --> X2[Conversion Yield]
    W2 --> Y2[Process Optimization]
    X2 --> Z2[Photocatalytic Efficiency]
    
    Y2 --> Z2
